## Change Classification

- [ ] Open-core MPL files only (`derrick`)

## MPL Compliance Checklist

- [ ] I identified whether this change touches MPL-covered files.
- [ ] All modifications to MPL-covered files are in this public repository.
- [ ] No proprietary implementation was added to MPL-covered files.
- [ ] No MPL-covered source was copied into private files.
- [ ] New enterprise functionality is behind a public interface, registration point, or plugin boundary (if applicable).
- [ ] License headers and notices were preserved.
- [ ] Release/source obligations were considered if this affects distributed binaries.
